texto: Once solved, the severe handicaps imposed on space exploration by the weight and chemical limitations of rockets would no longer apply. The whole timetable of our conquest of the planets in our solar system would be tremendously speeded up, from hot Mercury all the way out to frigid Pluto.
explicacao: Citação de Donald A. Wollheim sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Once solved, the severe handicaps imposed on space exploration by the weight and chemical limitat…” articula tempo, exploration, solar em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como termino e luto.
